Back

performance inch or I can barely move moving,

Sept 26, 2025 | Leon Gallery - A solitary movement work of the body that figures and the body as composite. Inching and itching, physicalities make and lose sense of the room we’re in, “disaster, the long cell of it” (Force Drift, Jeffrey Pethybridge).
